templates.title: Write blog post: {topic}
templates.description: Write a GEO-optimized blog post on {topic}. Follow the geo-llmseo-playbook and advanced-seo skills: answer-first lede, question-shaped headings, FAQPage JSON-LD, concrete sources. Target keywords: read team.target_keywords. File to wiki/Knowledge/GEO/Drafts/ and, if a GitHub identity is connected, open a PR and self-merge (squash merge).

templates.title: Close citation gap: {keyword}
templates.description: Citation share for {keyword} is weak. Diagnose why per the geo-llmseo-playbook (no content / not extractable / competitor owns it) and draft the single highest-leverage fix. File to wiki/Knowledge/GEO/Drafts/.

templates.title: Reddit comment batch: {subreddit}
templates.description: Scan r/{subreddit} for high-value threads and draft 2-3 comments following the reddit-playbook skill. Apply the quality checklist. Assign accounts per rotation rules. Return the batch for co-founder review — do not post without approval.

templates.title: Set up Reddit PRAW accounts
templates.description: Load the reddit-multiaccount skill. For each account in team.reddit_accounts that does not yet have client_id + client_secret, run the automated setup procedure: browser automation on old.reddit.com to create the API app, scrape credentials, and store the updated config back to vault. Report how many accounts are now fully configured.
